content.problemStatement: You are given a sorted array arr of distinct values and a target value x. You need to search for the index of the target value in the array.
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a sorted array of distinct integers and a target value. The array will be given as a space-separated list of integers, and the target value will be given on a new line.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the index at which the target value should be inserted to maintain the sorted order of the array.

solution.approach: Use binary search to find the correct position for the target value in the sorted array.
